items.summary: Restore the 'My Trips' section in the Customer Dashboard. Display a list of trips where trip.customerPrincipal == caller, showing status (pending/assigned/confirmed/completed/cancelled), pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare, and timestamps. After a new booking is submitted, the trip must appear in the list immediately without a hard refresh.

Restore the 'My Trips' tab in the Driver Dashboard alongside the existing 'Available Trips' tab. 'My Trips' shows trips where trip.driverPrincipal == caller. 'Available Trips' shows only trips with no driver assigned. Remove the 'coming soon' placeholder text.
